New Terminal Output:

root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# cat > /app/server.py << 'EOF'
> import grpc
> from concurrent import futures
> import kv_store_pb2
> import kv_store_pb2_grpc
>
> class KVStoreServicer(kv_store_pb2_grpc.KVStoreServicer):
>     def __init__(self):
>         self.store = {}
>
>     def GetVal(self, request, context):
>         key = request.key
>         val = self.store.get(key, 0)
>         return kv_store_pb2.GetValResponse(val=val)
>
>     def SetVal(self, request, context):
>         key = request.key
>         val = request.val
>         self.store[key] = val
>         return kv_store_pb2.SetValResponse(val=val)
>
> def serve():
>     server = grpc.server(futures.ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=10))
>     kv_store_pb2_grpc.add_KVStoreServicer_to_server(KVStoreServicer(), server)
>     server.add_insecure_port('[::]:5328')
>     server.start()
>     print("Server started on port 5328")
>     server.wait_for_termination()
>
> if __name__ == '__main__':
>     serve()
> EOF
